URI.SafeIframeHosts TYPE: lookup/null DEFAULT: null --DESCRIPTION-- <p> A whitelist which indicates what explicit hosts should be allowed to embed iframe. See also %HTML.SafeIframeRegexp, it has precedence over this config. Here are some example values: </p> <ul> <li><code>www.youtube.com</code> - Allow YouTube videos</li> <li><code>maps.google.com</code> - Allow Embedding a Google map</li> </ul> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
